The Science

Every ingredient earns its place.

Zero fillers. Every active at the dose that actually drives results.

Scroll to explore→
14%
Vitamin C — Ethyl Ascorbic Acid

A stable, bioavailable form. Fades dark spots and delivers visible radiance without oxidising.

1.5%
Salicylic Acid BHA

Oil-soluble exfoliant that penetrates pores, clears blackheads and prevents breakouts at the source.

5%
Niacinamide

Reduces pigmentation transfer, strengthens the skin barrier and refines visible pore size.

1%
Kojic Acid

Inhibits melanin synthesis. Reduces dark spots, tanning and post-inflammatory pigmentation.

2%
Hyaluronic Acid

Deep, lasting hydration that keeps skin plump through India's heat and humidity.

2%
Green Tea Extract

Antioxidant and anti-inflammatory. Calms acne-prone skin and controls excess oil.

0.8%
Sea Buckthorn

Antioxidant defence against UV-induced free radical damage. Omega-rich nourishment.

PA++++
Hybrid UV System

Mineral and chemical UV filters — maximum UVA + UVB protection without white cast.

Our Story

We knew too much
to keep buying
products that didn't
add up.

We were two people who cared too much about skincare and understood too much about ingredients to keep accepting what the market was offering. The right actives exist. The clinical evidence is there. It just wasn't being applied honestly — not at prices real people could afford, not for skin that actually looks like ours.

So we did the work ourselves. We partnered with cosmetic chemists who had spent careers studying melanin-rich skin. We tested through Delhi summers and Mumbai monsoons. We benchmarked every active against clinical literature. We priced everything at what it costs to make well — nothing more.

Four products came out of that process. Every one has a specific job, a specific active, and a disclosed percentage. No fillers. No inflated claims. No borrowed branding from abroad.

Jade and Bloom · Delhi, India · Founded with conviction.
Read Our Full Story
What We Believe

Science is not the opposite
of care. It is the highest form of it.

01
Real Percentages. Not Trace Amounts.

An ingredient at 0.001% is marketing. An ingredient at 14% is medicine. We disclose every concentration — because that's the only way you can know whether a product will actually work.

02
Made for Indian Skin. Not Adapted for It.

Indian skin faces Indian summers, Indian humidity, Indian pollution. Melanin-rich skin that wasn't considered in most formulations dominating the market. We built for this skin from the beginning.

03
Results Without Harshness.

Your skin barrier is not an obstacle to results — it is the foundation of them. Products that strip or over-exfoliate may show short-term change at the cost of long-term damage. We chose differently.
